content.full_text:
State of California 
Memorandum 
To 
: File 
From 
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
Ted Prim 
Date 
-7?-3cr? 
Subject: Legal description of home location. 
Feb. 7, 1977 
I advised Judge Bonnie Lee Martin that a legal description 
of her home location satisfied the reporting requirements 
of Section 87206(c). 
TP: jo

sections.question_synthetic: Whether a legal description of a home location satisfies the reporting requirements under Section 87206(c).
sections.conclusion_synthetic: A legal description of a home location satisfies the reporting requirements of Section 87206(c).
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a brief internal memorandum documenting oral advice rather than a formal advice letter with structured Q&C sections. No formal question or conclusion sections present; content extracted from subject line and body text.

CONCLUSION: A legal description of a home location satisfies the reporting requirements of Section 87206(c).
